---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Request

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

---

## ❗ Problem / Use Case

Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem clearly.

Example:

> I'm always frustrated when [...]

Explain the situation where this feature would help.

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

Explain:

- What should happen
- How users would interact with the feature
- Why this solution is helpful

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

Example:

- Using an external tool
- Manual configuration
- A different architecture

---

## 🧠 Additional Context

Add any additional information that might help:

- screenshots
- architecture diagrams
- use cases
- references to other tools

---

## 📦 Deployment Context (optional)

If this feature relates to self-hosting infrastructure, please share:

- Deployment method (Docker / Kubernetes / Other)
- Cloud provider (AWS / GCP / Azure / Self-hosted)
- Current workaround (if any)
